pet_notes: Keep Ginger as a compact whole-body orange tabby-and-white cat: orange coat with subtle tabby striping, white chest and paws, wide dark eyes, a small pink nose, upright ears, and a curved tail. Preserve realistic soft fur in a polished stylized pet-sprite look.
style_notes: Stylized, soft, friendly non-pixel pet sprite derived from the supplied cat; crisp silhouette and large readable features at small size.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row.
